zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bradshaigh於大約1245年出生在英國藍卡爾黑格時，他的父親Thomas Bradshaigh Sayer32歲，母親Agnes de Houghton24歲。他於大約1264年與Filia Bromley在英國藍卡爾黑格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1276年2月9日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾李享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Bradshaigh于大约1245年出生在英国藍卡爾黑格时，他的父亲Thomas Bradshaigh Sayer32岁，母亲Agnes de Houghton24岁。他于大约1264年与Filia Bromley在英国藍卡爾黑格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1276年2月9日在英国英格兰藍卡爾李享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bradshaigh was born about 1245, in Haigh, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas Bradshaigh Sayer, was 32 and his mother, Agnes de Houghton, was 24. He married Filia Bromley about 1264, in Haigh, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 9 February 1276, in Leigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bradshaigh est né environ 1245, à Haigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bradshaigh Sayer, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Houghton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Filia Bromley environ 1264, à Haigh, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 9 février 1276, à Leigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Bradshaigh um 1245 in Haigh, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bradshaigh Sayer 32 und seine Mutter Agnes de Houghton 24. Er hat um 1264 in Haigh, Lancashire, England Filia Bromley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 9. Februar 1276 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Leigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Filia Bromley circa 1264, nel Haigh, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 9 febbraio 1276, nel Leigh, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Bradshaighが約1245年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイグで生まれた時，父Thomas Bradshaigh Sayerは32歳，母Agnes de Houghtonは24歳であった。約1264年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイグでFilia Bromleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1276年2月9日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアレイグで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bradshaigh(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 랭카실르 하이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bradshaigh Sayer(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Houghton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1264년 영국 랭카실르 하이에서 Filia Bromley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1276년 2월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Filia Bromley aproximadamente 1264, em Haigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bradshaigh родился около 1245 г. в местности хеиг, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Bradshaigh Sayer было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Houghton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Filia Bromley около 1264 г. в местности хеиг, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 9 февраля 1276 г. в местности лиг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.
